data.name: ActivityReady
data.comment: Default activity title before any action

data.name: ActivityPickPath
data.value: Elija una ruta de configuración para comenzar.

data.name: ModeRecommendedTitle
data.comment: Sidebar nav label for recommended/easy install

data.name: ModeRecommendedDescription
data.comment: Workspace hero subtitle for recommended mode

data.name: ModeCustomTitle
data.comment: Sidebar nav label for custom install

data.name: ModeCustomDescription
data.comment: Workspace hero subtitle for custom mode

data.name: ModeMaintenanceTitle
data.comment: Sidebar nav label for maintenance mode

data.name: ModeMaintenanceDescription
data.comment: Workspace hero subtitle for maintenance mode

data.name: HeroGuidedSetup
data.comment: Hero eyebrow text for recommended/custom modes

data.name: HeroMaintenanceEyebrow
data.comment: Hero eyebrow text for maintenance mode

data.name: ReadyToRun
data.comment: Status when admin privileges are available

data.name: AdminStepNeeded
data.comment: Status when admin elevation is required

data.name: ReadyToRunDescription
data.value: LibreSpot puede parchar y recuperarse sin otro aviso de Windows.

data.name: AdminStepDescription
data.value: LibreSpot le pedirá permiso a Windows antes de ejecutar su backend.
data.comment: Explanation when not running as admin

data.name: SearchNoResultsHint
data.value: Pruebe con un término más amplio o borre la búsqueda para explorar el perfil completo nuevamente.

data.name: SearchHelpText
data.value: Busque títulos y descripciones de configuraciones en la página Personalizada.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for search box

data.name: SeverityWarning
data.comment: Health check has a non-critical issue

data.name: SeverityCritical
data.comment: Health check found a serious problem

data.name: ActionCreateBackup
data.value: Crear copia de seguridad de Spicetify

data.name: ActionRestoreBackup
data.value: Restaurar la última copia de seguridad

data.name: ActionReapply
data.value: Volver a aplicar después de la actualización

data.name: ButtonClearSearchName
data.comment: Accessibility name for clear search button

data.name: ButtonApplyCustomProfileHint
data.value: Guarda este perfil personalizado e inicia el instalador con esas selecciones.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for apply button

data.name: ButtonOpenLibreSpotFolderHint
data.value: Abre la carpeta de configuración de LibreSpot para que pueda inspeccionar la copia de seguridad del perfil recuperado.

data.name: ButtonOpenLibreSpotFolderActivityHint
data.value: Abre la carpeta de configuración de LibreSpot, incluidas las copias de seguridad de configuración e install.log.

data.name: ButtonRefreshEnvironmentHint
data.value: Vuelva a verificar Spotify, Spicetify y el estado del perfil guardado.

data.name: ButtonExportBundleName
data.comment: Accessibility name for export bundle button

data.name: ButtonExportBundleHint
data.value: Escribe un archivo zip de soporte local de LibreSpot redactado utilizando las categorías de diagnóstico seleccionadas.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for export bundle button

data.name: ButtonExportFailureBundleName
data.comment: Accessibility name for failure bundle button

data.name: ButtonExportFailureBundleHint
data.value: Escribe un ZIP local redactado con el registro de esta ejecución fallida, el estado de salud, el diario de operaciones y los metadatos del backend.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for failure bundle button

data.name: ButtonEnableWatcherName
data.value: Habilitar el observador de reaplicación automática

data.name: ButtonEnableWatcherHint
data.value: Registra la tarea programada que vuelve a aplicar LibreSpot después de las actualizaciones de Spotify.

data.name: ButtonDisableWatcherName
data.value: Deshabilitar el observador de reaplicación automática

data.name: ButtonDisableWatcherHint
data.value: Elimina la tarea de vigilancia de reaplicación automática programada.

data.name: ButtonCancelRunHint
data.value: Detiene la ejecución activa de LibreSpot.

data.name: ButtonCopyLogName
data.comment: Accessibility name for copy log button

data.name: ButtonCopyLogHint
data.value: Copia el registro de ejecución visible al portapapeles.

data.name: ConfigUnsaved
data.comment: Shown when config has unsaved changes

data.name: SidebarDescription
data.value: Recomendado se encarga de la ruta estable. Personalizado mantiene visibles los cambios deliberados. Mantenimiento se centra en la recuperación.

data.name: DashboardSnapshotMissingDetail
data.value: Snapshot aún no ha verificado este componente.

data.name: DashboardNoPatchRecord
data.comment: Status dashboard last patch fallback value

data.name: DashboardNoPatchRecordDetail
data.value: Ejecute la configuración o vuelva a aplicarla una vez para que LibreSpot pueda registrar el estado del parche.
data.comment: Status dashboard last patch fallback detail

data.name: StackSnapshotHint
data.value: Actualice después de cambiar Spotify fuera de LibreSpot para que las recomendaciones sigan siendo precisas.

data.name: MaintenanceCardDefaultDetail
data.value: Se ejecuta aquí y deja el resultado visible cuando finaliza LibreSpot.

data.name: MaintenanceCardDestructiveDetail
data.value: Úselo solo cuando desee borrar la configuración actual y reconstruir desde cero.

data.name: RecommendedModeHint
data.value: Utilice Recomendado para las primeras instalaciones, reparaciones después de una actualización de Spotify o en cualquier momento que desee el camino más rápido para regresar a una configuración en buen estado.

data.name: InstallPostureDescription
data.value: Elija si LibreSpot se reconstruye primero y si Spotify se vuelve a abrir cuando finaliza la ejecución.

data.name: AppearanceDescription
data.value: Tema, esquema, letra, caché y compatibilidad.

data.name: ThemePackHint
data.value: Seleccione el paquete de temas Spicetify que LibreSpot debería restaurar.

data.name: ThemeGallerySearchName
data.comment: Accessibility name for theme gallery search

data.name: ThemeGallerySearchHint
data.value: Escriba un requisito de tema, esquema, fuente o theme.js para filtrar la galería.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for theme gallery search

data.name: ThemeGalleryNoResults
data.value: Ningún tema coincide con esta búsqueda.

data.name: ThemeGalleryRequiresJsBadge
data.comment: Badge for themes that require theme.js

data.name: ThemeGalleryMarketplaceBadge
data.comment: Badge for marketplace-only fallback theme selection

data.name: ThemeGallerySchemesLabel
data.comment: Theme gallery scheme chip section label

data.name: CacheLimitHint
data.value: Establece un límite de caché en megabytes, o deja cero para mantener el comportamiento predeterminado de Spotify.

data.name: CacheLimitDefault
data.value: Deje 0 para el comportamiento de caché predeterminado.

data.name: CompatibilityTargetLabel
data.comment: Section label for Spotify version targeting

data.name: SpotifyCompatibilityHint
data.value: Elija la compilación de Spotify que LibreSpot debe fijar cuando desee un control de compatibilidad más explícito.

data.name: DownloadMethodName
data.comment: Accessibility name for download method dropdown

data.name: DownloadMethodHint
data.value: Anule la ruta de transferencia predeterminada de LibreSpot solo cuando su red o entorno lo requiera.

data.name: PlaybackBehaviorDescription
data.value: Estas configuraciones dan forma a la experiencia diaria de Spotify después de la aplicación del parche.

data.name: AdvancedAdjustmentsHint
data.value: Déjalos fuera a menos que sepas que los necesitas.

data.name: BuiltInExtensionsDescription
data.value: Extras LibreSpot gestiona con este perfil.

data.name: NoExtensionsHint
data.value: Manténgalo simple o agregue ayudas solo cuando los necesite.

data.name: AutoReapplyTitle
data.value: Volver a aplicar automáticamente después de las actualizaciones de Spotify

data.name: RefreshRecoverDescription
data.value: Utilícelos primero para comprobaciones, reaplicaciones y trabajos de reversión más ligeros.

data.name: ResetDescription
data.value: Úselo solo cuando desee eliminar la configuración actual y comenzar desde una línea de base más limpia.

data.name: MaintenanceClosingHint
data.value: Primero cierre Spotify si la reproducción está activa y copie el registro si algo parece inusual.

data.name: ActivityDialogHint
data.value: Muestra el progreso en vivo, el estado actual y resultados de solución de problemas.
data.comment: Accessibility help text for activity overlay

data.name: UndoPaneTitle
data.comment: Undo pane heading after a successful run

data.name: UndoPaneDescription
data.value: Estos cambios completados incluyen una nota de deshacer manual del diario de operaciones.
data.comment: Undo pane description after a successful run

data.name: RunLogDescription
data.value: Notas detalladas de progreso y recuperación de esta ejecución.

data.name: LogEmptyStateTitle
data.value: Los detalles de la ejecución aparecerán aquí

data.name: LogEmptyStateHint
data.value: El progreso, las advertencias y las pistas de recuperación aparecen tan pronto como LibreSpot tiene algo que informar.

data.name: PromptActionReset
data.comment: Prompt overlay title for destructive actions

data.name: NoBundleExported
data.value: No se exportó ningún paquete de soporte en esta sesión.

data.name: ExportBundleTitle
data.value: Exportar paquete de soporte de LibreSpot

data.name: PreparingBackend
data.value: Preparando el tiempo de ejecución del backend

data.name: RunNeedsAttention
data.comment: Activity title when run has warnings

data.name: RunComplete
data.comment: Activity title when run finishes successfully

data.name: StatusNeedsReview
data.comment: Run status badge when warnings exist

data.name: Option_CleanInstall_Description
data.value: Borre Spotify antiguo y restos de personalización antes de que LibreSpot reconstruya la configuración.

data.name: Option_LaunchAfter_Description
data.value: Inicie Spotify automáticamente después de que se complete LibreSpot.

data.name: Option_SpotX_NewTheme_Title
data.value: Habilitar el nuevo tema de SpotX

data.name: Option_SpotX_NewTheme_Description
data.value: Aplique los ajustes más nuevos del shell SpotX para obtener un marco de Spotify más limpio.

data.name: Option_SpotX_PodcastsOff_Description
data.value: Reduzca las superficies de podcasts en Spotify para una configuración centrada en la música.

data.name: Option_SpotX_BlockUpdate_Description
data.value: Mantenga Spotify fijado para que sea menos probable que su configuración se rompa inesperadamente.

data.name: Option_SpotX_AdSectionsOff_Description
data.value: Elimina las secciones promocionadas con publicidad de las vistas clave de Spotify.

data.name: Option_SpotX_Premium_Description
data.value: Omita los parches centrados en publicidad y mantenga el resto de la pila de LibreSpot.

data.name: Option_SpotX_DisableStartup_Description
data.value: Evite que Spotify se inicie automáticamente con Windows.

data.name: Option_SpotX_NoShortcut_Description
data.value: Evite el desorden de accesos directos en el escritorio durante la instalación.

data.name: Option_SpotX_StartSpoti_Title
data.value: Inicie Spotify después de la instalación

data.name: Option_SpotX_StartSpoti_Description
data.value: Deje que SpotX inicie Spotify en el momento en que finalice el parche.

data.name: Option_SpotX_LyricsEnabled_Description
data.value: Active la compatibilidad con letras parcheadas y elija un aspecto de letra.

data.name: Option_SpotX_TopSearch_Description
data.value: Mueva la búsqueda de Spotify a una posición más siempre disponible.

data.name: Option_SpotX_RightSidebarOff_Description
data.value: Reduzca el cromo secundario para obtener un diseño de reproducción más centrado.

data.name: Option_SpotX_RightSidebarClr_Title
data.value: Borrar estilo de la barra lateral derecha

data.name: Option_SpotX_RightSidebarClr_Description
data.value: Utilice un estilo más claro en la barra lateral derecha en lugar de ocultarlo.

data.name: Option_SpotX_CanvasHomeOff_Description
data.value: Reduzca el movimiento y el desorden del lienzo en la superficie de inicio de Spotify.

data.name: Option_SpotX_HomeSubOff_Description
data.value: Elimine algunos de los módulos de inicio de Spotify con muchas recomendaciones.

data.name: Option_SpotX_OldLyrics_Description
data.value: Vuelva al tratamiento de diseño de letras anterior.

data.name: Option_SpotX_HideColIconOff_Title
data.value: Mantener visible el icono de colección

data.name: Option_SpotX_HideColIconOff_Description
data.value: Evita que SpotX oculte los controles de la colección.

data.name: Option_SpotX_Plus_Description
data.value: Aplique el paquete de ajustes SpotX más amplio para obtener un shell de Spotify más modificado.

data.name: Option_SpotX_NewFullscreen_Description
data.value: Habilite la experiencia de reproducción alternativa en pantalla completa de SpotX.

data.name: Option_SpotX_FunnyProgress_Description
data.value: Cambie por la divertida variante de barra de progreso de SpotX.

data.name: Option_SpotX_ExpSpotify_Description
data.value: Permitir indicadores experimentales de Spotify cuando SpotX los admita.

data.name: Option_SpotX_LyricsBlock_Description
data.value: Deshabilite algunas superposiciones relacionadas con letras en estados parcheados.

data.name: Option_SpotX_SendVersionOff_Title
data.value: Deshabilitar los informes de versión de SpotX

data.name: Option_SpotX_SendVersionOff_Description
data.value: Bloquea la notificación de versión saliente de SpotX (introducida en abril de 2026). Se recomienda dejarlo activado.

data.name: Option_SpotX_DevTools_Title
data.value: Habilitar las herramientas para desarrolladores de Spotify

data.name: Option_SpotX_DevTools_Description
data.value: Desbloquea la tecla de acceso rápido Chromium DevTools dentro de Spotify para los autores de extensiones.

data.name: Option_SpotX_Mirror_Description
data.value: Vuelve al espejo de github.io cuando raw.githubusercontent.com está bloqueado.

data.name: Option_SpotX_ConfirmUninstall_Title
data.value: Forzar la desinstalación limpia antes de parchear

data.name: Option_SpotX_ConfirmUninstall_Description
data.value: Ejecuta el flujo de desinstalación y reinstalación de SpotX incluso cuando, de otro modo, se mantendría la versión actual.

data.name: Option_Spicetify_Marketplace_Description
data.value: Incluya la aplicación personalizada Spicetify Marketplace de forma predeterminada.

data.name: Extension_fullAppDisplay_Description
data.value: Convierta la carátula del álbum y los controles de reproducción en una presentación de pantalla completa.

data.name: Extension_shuffle_plus_Description
data.value: Utilice una reproducción aleatoria de Fisher-Yates en lugar de la reproducción aleatoria ponderada de Spotify.

data.name: Extension_trashbin_Description
data.value: Omita las canciones y los artistas que marque como no deseados.

data.name: Extension_keyboardShortcut_Description
data.value: Agregue navegación estilo Vim para un control del teclado más rápido.

data.name: Extension_bookmark_Description
data.value: Guarde y recupere páginas, pistas, álbumes y marcas de tiempo.

data.name: Extension_loopyLoop_Description
data.value: Repita segmentos de pista exactos para practicar o repetir la escucha.

data.name: Extension_popupLyrics_Description
data.value: Abra letras sincronizadas en una ventana separada de tamaño variable.

data.name: Extension_autoSkipVideo_Description
data.value: Omita automáticamente videos de lienzo y contenido visual no compatible.

data.name: Extension_autoSkipExplicit_Description
data.value: Saltar automáticamente las pistas marcadas como explícitas.

data.name: Extension_webnowplaying_Description
data.value: Exponga los datos que se reproducen actualmente para integraciones de escritorio y widgets.

data.name: Extension_hidePodcasts_Description
data.value: Elimine elementos de la interfaz de usuario de podcasts, episodios y audiolibros.

data.name: Extension_beautiful_lyrics_Description
data.value: Letras sincronizadas inmersivas con fondos dinámicos y desenfoque. Se conecta a un servicio de letras de terceros (no solo GitHub/Spotify).

data.name: Extension_playlist_icons_Description
data.value: Agregue íconos personalizados e imágenes de carpetas a las listas de reproducción.

data.name: Extension_volumePercentage_Description
data.value: Muestra el porcentaje de volumen exacto junto al control deslizante.

data.name: Extension_adblock_Description
data.value: Bloqueo de anuncios en la capa de Spicetify para cuando el parcheo de SpotX falla en una versión más reciente de Spotify. No es un reemplazo de SpotX.

data.name: Maintenance_CheckUpdates_Description
data.value: Compare las dependencias fijadas de LibreSpot y la línea base de compatibilidad de SpotX/Spicetify antes de actualizar la pila.

data.name: Maintenance_CheckUpdates_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for CheckUpdates

data.name: Maintenance_Reapply_Description
data.value: Actualice SpotX primero y luego restaure el tema Spicetify guardado y el estado de la extensión.

data.name: Maintenance_Reapply_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for Reapply

data.name: Maintenance_RepairMarketplace_Description
data.value: Reinstale la aplicación personalizada Spicetify Marketplace, aplíquela y abra spotify:app:marketplace si falta la entrada de la barra lateral.

data.name: Maintenance_RepairMarketplace_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for RepairMarketplace

data.name: Maintenance_OpenMarketplace_Description
data.value: Abra spotify:app:marketplace cuando la aplicación personalizada de Marketplace ya esté instalada y registrada.

data.name: Maintenance_OpenMarketplace_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for OpenMarketplace

data.name: Maintenance_SafeMode_Description
data.value: Desactiva todos los temas y extensiones sin desinstalarlos. Spotify se cargará con su aspecto original; usa «Aplicar de nuevo» para restaurar tu configuración.

data.name: Maintenance_SafeMode_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for SafeMode

data.name: Maintenance_CreateBackup_Title
data.value: Crear copia de seguridad de Spicetify

data.name: Maintenance_CreateBackup_Description
data.value: Guarda una copia de seguridad de la configuración y los temas actuales de Spicetify. Las copias de seguridad se almacenan en tu carpeta de perfil de LibreSpot y se pueden restaurar más tarde.

data.name: Maintenance_CreateBackup_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for CreateBackup

data.name: Maintenance_RestoreBackup_Title
data.value: Restaurar la última copia de seguridad

data.name: Maintenance_RestoreBackup_Description
data.value: Restaura la copia de seguridad más reciente de la configuración de Spicetify y vuelve a aplicar las personalizaciones. No modifica tus ajustes de SpotX ni de LibreSpot.

data.name: Maintenance_RestoreBackup_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for RestoreBackup

data.name: Maintenance_RestoreVanilla_Description
data.value: Elimine las personalizaciones activas de Spicetify mientras deja SpotX en su lugar.

data.name: Maintenance_RestoreVanilla_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for RestoreVanilla

data.name: Maintenance_UninstallSpicetify_Description
data.value: Restaure Spotify y luego elimine la CLI de Spicetify, la carpeta de configuración y la entrada PATH.

data.name: Maintenance_UninstallSpicetify_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for UninstallSpicetify

data.name: Maintenance_FullReset_Description
data.value: Elimina SpotX y Spicetify, desinstala la propia aplicación de Spotify y limpia los restos para un comienzo realmente limpio. Después, reinstala Spotify (o ejecuta la configuración Recomendada).

data.name: Maintenance_FullReset_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for FullReset

data.name: Maintenance_RemoveSelfData_Description
data.value: Cancela el registro de la tarea del observador y elimina la configuración, las copias de seguridad, los registros y los informes de errores propios de LibreSpot. Spotify y Spicetify no se ven afectados.

data.name: Maintenance_RemoveSelfData_ButtonText
data.comment: Maintenance action button text for RemoveSelfData

data.name: RecommendedHighlight_1
data.value: Comienza desde un estado limpio de Spotify.

data.name: RecommendedHighlight_2
data.value: Aplica la línea base de SpotX fijada con actualizaciones bloqueadas.

data.name: RecommendedHighlight_3
data.value: Restaura Spicetify, Marketplace y las extensiones iniciales.

data.name: RecommendedHighlight_4
data.value: Guarda un perfil confiable para reaplicación, recuperación y mantenimiento futuro.

data.name: LanguageHelpText
data.value: Cambia el idioma de la interfaz de LibreSpot. El ajuste se guarda localmente.

data.name: Ui_RestartsLibreSpotWithAdministratorAccessBeforeApplyingChanges
data.value: Reinicia LibreSpot con acceso de administrador antes de aplicar los cambios.

data.name: Ui_RunsLibreSpotSMostReliableInstallPathWith
data.value: Ejecuta la ruta de instalación más confiable de LibreSpot con el perfil predeterminado guardado.

data.name: Ui_AuthorAndDryRunASpotXPatchesJson
data.value: Cree y ejecute en seco un archivo SpotX patches.json antes de que LibreSpot lo prepare para SpotX.

data.name: Ui_StageCustomPatchesDuringInstallAndReapply
data.value: Prepare parches personalizados durante la instalación y la reaplicación

data.name: Ui_WhenEnabledLibreSpotValidatesThisJSONAndWrites
data.value: Cuando está habilitado, LibreSpot valida este JSON y escribe un patches.json temporal para SpotX.

data.name: Ui_HTTPSURLToASpotXPatchesJsonFile
data.value: URL HTTPS a un archivo SpotX patches.json

data.name: Ui_CustomPatchesImportURL
data.value: URL de importación de parches personalizados

data.name: Ui_EnterAnHTTPSURLThenImportTheJSON
data.value: Ingrese una URL HTTPS y luego importe el JSON para revisión local.

data.name: Ui_SpotXCustomPatchesJSONEditor
data.value: Editor JSON de parches personalizados de SpotX

data.name: Ui_PasteOrEditSpotXPatchesJsonContentHere
data.value: Pegue o edite el contenido de SpotX patches.json aquí y luego realice un ensayo antes de aplicarlo.

data.name: Ui_ReloadsBundledTemplatesAndLocalProfileFilesFrom
data.value: Recarga plantillas empaquetadas y archivos de perfil locales desde el disco.

data.name: Ui_SaveNamedPresetsPreviewTemplatesAndImportShared
data.value: Guarde ajustes preestablecidos con nombre, obtenga una vista previa de las plantillas e importe archivos .librespot compartidos antes de escribir algo.

data.name: Ui_NamedLibreSpotProfilesAndBundledTemplates
data.value: Perfiles de LibreSpot con nombre y plantillas incluidas.

data.name: Ui_SaveTheCurrentCustomSelectionsOrImportA
data.value: Guarde las selecciones personalizadas actuales o importe un archivo .librespot para crear el primer perfil local.

data.name: Ui_AnnouncesTheLatestProfileActionResult
data.value: Anuncia el último resultado de la acción del perfil.

data.name: Ui_ShowsAnInertShareLinkQRCodeAnd
data.value: Muestra un enlace para compartir inerte, un código QR y una comparación de perfil para el perfil seleccionado.

data.name: Ui_InertLibrespotProfileLinkForPreviewOnlyImport
data.value: Enlace de perfil de librespot inerte para importación solo de vista previa.

data.name: Ui_CopySelectedProfileShareLink
data.value: Copiar el enlace para compartir del perfil seleccionado

data.name: Ui_LoadsTheSelectedProfileIntoTheCustomEditor
data.value: Carga el perfil seleccionado en el editor personalizado sin escribir config.json.

data.name: Ui_ConfirmsAndWritesTheSelectedProfileToConfig
data.value: Confirma y escribe el perfil seleccionado en config.json.

data.name: Ui_NameUsedWhenSavingOrRenamingALocal
data.value: Nombre utilizado al guardar o cambiar el nombre de un perfil local.

data.name: Ui_ShortDescriptionStoredWithTheLocalProfile
data.value: Breve descripción almacenada con el perfil local.

data.name: Ui_SavesTheCurrentCustomSelectionsAsANew
data.value: Guarda las selecciones personalizadas actuales como un nuevo perfil local.

data.name: Ui_CreatesANewLocalCopyOfTheSelected
data.value: Crea una nueva copia local del perfil seleccionado.

data.name: Ui_RenameSelectedProfile
data.value: Cambiar el nombre del perfil seleccionado

data.name: Ui_RenamesTheSelectedLocalProfileUsingTheProfile
data.value: Cambia el nombre del perfil local seleccionado utilizando el campo de nombre del perfil.

data.name: Ui_OpensALibrespotProfileAsAnInertPreview
data.value: Abre un perfil .librespot como una vista previa inerte antes de guardarlo localmente.

data.name: Ui_ExportsTheSelectedProfileAsASafeLibrespot
data.value: Exporta el perfil seleccionado como un archivo .librespot seguro.

data.name: Ui_ConfirmsAndRemovesTheSelectedLocalProfileFile
data.value: Confirma y elimina el archivo de perfil local seleccionado.

data.name: Ui_ChangelogPreview
data.value: Vista previa del registro de cambios

data.name: Ui_OpenSpicetifyExtensionDocs
data.value: Abra los documentos de la extensión Spicetify

data.name: Ui_OpenSpicetifyThemeCatalog
data.value: Abrir el catálogo de temas de Spicetify

data.name: Ui_DismissesTheActivityPanelAfterTheRunIs
data.value: Cierra el panel de actividades una vez finalizada la ejecución.

data.name: Ui_ConfirmsAnImportantLibreSpotActionBeforeItRuns
data.value: Confirma una acción importante de LibreSpot antes de ejecutarse.

data.name: Tray_Open
data.comment: Tray menu item: reopen the main window

data.name: Tray_OpenFolder
data.comment: Tray menu item: open the LibreSpot configuration folder

data.name: Tray_Exit
data.comment: Tray menu item: close the app from the tray

data.name: Tray_BalloonTitle
data.comment: Tray balloon title shown when the window minimizes to the tray

data.name: Tray_BalloonText
data.value: Haz doble clic en este icono para volver a abrir LibreSpot.
data.comment: Tray balloon text when minimized while idle

data.name: Tray_BalloonTextRunning
data.value: LibreSpot sigue en ejecución. Haz doble clic en este icono para volver a abrir el registro en vivo.
data.comment: Tray balloon text when minimized during an active run

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveCanceled
data.value: LibreSpot stopped early. Review the log, then rerun Recommended or Reapply if Spotify looks inconsistent.

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveComplete
data.value: Your saved profile and maintenance tools are ready for the next pass.

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveError
data.value: Open the LibreSpot folder or copy the log before retrying so the next run starts with better context.

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveIdle
data.value: You can dismiss this panel or copy the log for reference.

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveRunning
data.value: LibreSpot keeps the live log and diagnostics on disk while this runs. You can cancel here if you need to stop early.

data.name: Vm_ActivityAssistiveStopping
data.value: LibreSpot is stopping the backend and preserving the log gathered so far.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyActiveDetail
data.value: LibreSpot checks after Windows sign-in and every 30 minutes, then reapplies only after Spotify updates while Spotify is closed.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyOffDetail
data.value: Enable the watcher to restore your saved SpotX and Spicetify setup after Spotify updates itself.

data.name: Vm_ClearCacheActionDescription
data.value: Remove stale or corrupt cached downloads. Verified assets will be cached again on demand.

data.name: Vm_ConfigRecoveryNewerBackupFormat
data.value: LibreSpot kept the config.json from a newer LibreSpot build aside and loaded safe defaults.{0} Update LibreSpot before reusing that profile. Backup kept as {1}.

data.name: Vm_ConfigRecoveryNewerNoBackupFormat
data.value: LibreSpot loaded safe defaults because config.json was saved by a newer build.{0} Update LibreSpot before reusing that profile.

data.name: Vm_ConfigRecoveryUnreadableBackupFormat
data.value: LibreSpot moved the unreadable config.json aside and reopened with safe defaults.{0} Apply Recommended or Custom to save a fresh profile. Backup kept as {1}.

data.name: Vm_ConfigRecoveryUnreadableNoBackupFormat
data.value: LibreSpot reopened with safe defaults because config.json could not be read safely.{0} Apply Recommended or Custom to save a fresh profile.

data.name: Vm_CustomApplyAdmin
data.value: LibreSpot relaunches with administrator access before it touches Spotify.

data.name: Vm_CustomApplyConflict
data.value: Turn off either Hide right sidebar or Clear right sidebar styling; when both are selected, hiding wins.

data.name: Vm_CustomApplyPatchJson
data.value: Fix the custom patches JSON before LibreSpot stages it for SpotX.

data.name: Vm_CustomApplyReady
data.value: LibreSpot saves this profile to config.json, then applies it through the original backend.

data.name: Vm_CustomApplyRecovery
data.value: LibreSpot replaces the unreadable config.json with this profile and keeps the recovered copy in the LibreSpot folder.

data.name: Vm_CustomAppsSectionDescription
data.value: Optional Spicetify apps installed from pinned release ZIPs. These appear as Spotify apps, not normal extensions.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesSearchDescription
data.value: SpotX patches.json JSON authoring regex validation dry run import URL

data.name: Vm_CustomProfileBalancedDetail
data.value: You are personalizing the stack without moving far beyond what is usually easy to reapply after updates.

data.name: Vm_CustomProfileHeavyDetail
data.value: Several advanced toggles are active, so expect more upkeep after Spotify changes.

data.name: Vm_CustomProfileNearDefaultDetail
data.value: This stays close to LibreSpot's supported baseline with room for a few deliberate preferences.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessAdminDetail
data.value: LibreSpot asks Windows for administrator access before it patches Spotify.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessConflictDetail
data.value: Hide right sidebar and clear right sidebar styling are both selected. Hiding the sidebar wins, so the styling option adds noise.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessExistingInstallDetail
data.value: Skipping a clean start usually helps only when Spotify is already installed. Recommended is safer on a blank machine.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessPatchJsonDetail
data.value: Run the custom patches dry run and fix the listed JSON or regex issue before applying this profile.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessReadyDetail
data.value: LibreSpot saves this profile first, then applies it so maintenance and reapply stay in sync.

data.name: Vm_CustomReadinessRecoveryDetail
data.value: Applying now writes a fresh config.json and keeps the recovered backup untouched for reference.

data.name: Vm_CustomSearchDefaultSummary
data.value: Search titles and descriptions across Custom.

data.name: Vm_CustomSelectionAligned
data.value: Still aligned with the stable Recommended baseline.

data.name: Vm_CustomSelectionManyChangesFormat
data.value: {0} deliberate changes from the default stable profile.

data.name: Vm_CustomSelectionOneChange
data.value: 1 deliberate change from the default stable profile.

data.name: Vm_EnvironmentFreshDetailFormat
data.value: Last checked at {0}. Refresh after you change Spotify outside LibreSpot.
data.comment: EnvironmentSnapshotStateViewModel localized runtime text. {0} is a localized time.

data.name: Vm_EnvironmentLastRefreshedFormat
data.comment: EnvironmentSnapshotStateViewModel localized runtime text. {0} is a localized time.

data.name: Vm_EnvironmentStaleDetailFormat
data.value: Last checked at {0}. Recheck before you repair or reset if anything changed outside LibreSpot.
data.comment: EnvironmentSnapshotStateViewModel localized runtime text. {0} is a localized time.

data.name: Vm_EnvironmentUncheckedDetail
data.value: Use Refresh environment before you decide whether Spotify, Spicetify, or the saved profile need repair.

data.name: Vm_LyricsThemeAvailableHint
data.value: SpotX restores this lyrics skin after patching.

data.name: Vm_LyricsThemeUnavailableHint
data.value: Turn on the lyrics patch to make this selection matter.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceBackupUnchecked
data.value: Backup state has not been checked yet.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceIncompleteDetail
data.value: Reapply becomes useful once the customization layer is back in place. Until then, Recommended is usually the better path.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceMarketplaceUnchecked
data.value: Marketplace state has not been checked yet.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadinessAllReady
data.value: Spotify, SpotX, Spicetify, Marketplace, and theme state are all ready.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadinessNoneReady
data.value: No customization stack components are ready yet.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadinessPartial
data.value: Spotify, SpotX, Spicetify, Marketplace, and theme checks are partially ready.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadyDetail
data.value: Start with the safer actions. Use reset only when you want to clear the stack and rebuild.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadyWhenNeededDetail
data.value: Most repair actions matter after Spotify is installed. You can still inspect versions, export support details, or prepare a clean reset.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceReadyWhenNeededTitle
data.value: Maintenance is ready when you need it

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceThemeUnchecked
data.value: Theme state has not been checked yet.

data.name: Vm_MarketplaceUnavailable
data.value: Marketplace unavailable until Spicetify is installed

data.name: Vm_ActivityLogClipboardUnavailable
data.value: Clipboard was unavailable. Log is still saved to install.log.

data.name: Vm_ProfileActiveDetail
data.value: This profile is active. Applying another profile keeps this one as the previous active pointer for rollback.

data.name: Vm_ProfileAutomationHelpBuiltInFormat
data.value: {0} is a bundled template that can be previewed, applied, or duplicated.

data.name: Vm_ProfileAutomationHelpLocalFormat
data.value: {0} is a local profile that can be previewed, renamed, exported, applied, duplicated, or deleted.

data.name: Vm_ProfileComparisonClipboardUnavailable
data.value: Clipboard was unavailable. The comparison remains visible here.

data.name: Vm_ProfileComparisonInitial
data.value: Select a profile to compare it with Recommended.

data.name: Vm_ProfileEditorBuiltIn
data.value: The fields are prefilled with a copy name so Duplicate creates an editable local profile.

data.name: Vm_ProfileEditorEditable
data.value: Edit the name or notes, then use Rename to update this local profile.

data.name: Vm_ProfileEditorNoSelection
data.value: Use a clear name before saving the current Custom selections as a local profile.

data.name: Vm_ProfileNoSelectionDetail
data.value: Refresh profiles, import a .librespot file, or save the current Custom selections as a local profile.

data.name: Vm_ProfileOperationInitial
data.value: Local profiles load when LibreSpot starts.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSelectionActive
data.value: This local profile is active. Duplicate it before experimenting, or export it as a restore point.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSelectionBuiltIn
data.value: Bundled templates are read-only. Preview one, set it active, or duplicate it before editing.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSelectionLocal
data.value: Local profile selected. Preview first when you want to inspect settings without writing config.json.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSelectionNone
data.value: Select a template or local profile to preview, duplicate, export, or set active.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSelectionPaused
data.value: Profile actions pause while LibreSpot is running so config.json cannot change mid-run.

data.name: Vm_ProfileShareClipboardUnavailable
data.value: Clipboard was unavailable. Use Export to share the profile file instead.

data.name: Vm_ProfileShareInitial
data.value: Select a profile to create an inert share card.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedDurationCleanMachine
data.value: Usually 3-4 minutes because LibreSpot may need to lay down the full stack first.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedDurationExistingSpotify
data.value: Usually 2-3 minutes, depending on whether Spotify restarts.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedFollowUpFirstProfile
data.value: LibreSpot will create the first saved profile during this run so maintenance has a dependable baseline.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedFollowUpRecovery
data.value: This run writes a fresh config.json and keeps the recovered backup in the LibreSpot folder for reference.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedFollowUpSavedProfile
data.value: The saved LibreSpot profile stays aligned with this run, so reapply and maintenance stay predictable later.

data.name: Vm_SearchCacheLimitDescription
data.value: Leave 0 for the default cache behavior.

data.name: Vm_SearchThemePackDescription
data.value: Choose the Spicetify theme pack LibreSpot restores.

data.name: Vm_ShellBackupCreatedPending
data.value: LibreSpot creates restore data during setup.

data.name: Vm_ShellBackupCreatedSaved
data.value: Saved profile and restore data are available.

data.name: Vm_ShellClearLogHint
data.value: Clears the activity rows shown here. The install.log file remains on disk.

data.name: Vm_ShellLogFilterHint
data.value: Cycles the activity view through all levels, warnings and errors, and errors only.

data.name: Vm_UnknownBackendFailure
data.value: LibreSpot reported an unknown backend failure.

data.name: Vm_ShellActivityEmptyDetail
data.value: Las ejecuciones, reparaciones y notas de recuperación aparecerán aquí.

data.name: Vm_ShellActivityFilterEmptyDetail
data.value: Ninguna actividad coincide con este filtro.

data.name: Vm_ShellCheckingSystem
data.comment: Readiness title while environment checks run.

data.name: Vm_ShellCheckingSystemDetail
data.comment: Readiness detail while environment checks run.

data.name: Vm_ShellSnapshotUnavailable
data.comment: Readiness title after an environment check fails.

data.name: Vm_ShellSnapshotUnavailableDetail
data.value: LibreSpot no pudo verificar este equipo. Selecciona Verificar entorno para intentarlo de nuevo antes de ejecutar la configuración.

data.name: Vm_ShellSpotifyModificationDetail
data.value: Patches files in the local Spotify directory.

data.name: Vm_ShellTrustedSourcesDetail
data.value: Pinned downloads are hash-verified before use.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleEstimatedSizeFormat
data.value: Estimated local zip size before compression: {0}.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleRedactionSummary
data.value: User paths, machine/user names, GitHub headers, proxy credentials, tokens, passwords, and command-line secret arguments are redacted before the zip is written.

data.name: Vm_ThemeSchemeAvailableHint
data.value: Color scheme inside the selected theme pack.

data.name: Vm_ThemeSchemeMarketplaceOnlyHint
data.value: Marketplace-only skips the theme pack, so no extra scheme is applied.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceHeroCustomBody
data.value: Adjust supported options without losing track of the baseline.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceHeroMaintenanceBody
data.value: Use repair, rollback, and reset tools when the stack needs attention.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceHeroRecommendedBody
data.value: Everything looks good. You're ready to run the recommended setup.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationFinishBrief
data.value: Fastest way to restore the supported layer.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationFinishDetail
data.value: Spotify is already installed. Recommended restores the supported customization layer with the least friction.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationMaintainDetail
data.value: Recommended is still the fastest way back to a clean baseline. Move to Custom once you know what you want to keep.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationRecoverBrief
data.value: Best way to save a clean profile again.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationRecoverDetail
data.value: LibreSpot recovered from an unreadable profile. Recommended writes a clean baseline again, or you can inspect the backup first.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationStartBrief
data.value: Fastest way to lay down the known-good baseline.

data.name: Vm_WorkspaceRecommendationStartDetail
data.value: No Spotify stack yet. Recommended is the safest starting point.

data.name: Vm_ThemeGalleryMarketplaceHelp
data.value: Uses Spicetify Marketplace without installing a bundled theme.

data.name: Vm_ThemeGalleryNoJsHelpFormat
data.value: {0} installs without a theme.js step and has {1}.

data.name: Vm_ShellActionRunSetupDetail
data.value: Apply all recommended patches and configuration.

data.name: Vm_ShellActionToolsDetail
data.value: View logs, backup files, and advanced utilities.

data.name: Vm_ShellRunRecommendedCaption
data.value: Applies all recommended patches and configuration for LibreSpot.

data.name: Vm_ActionCouldNotFinishDetail
data.value: Review the run log before trying again.

data.name: Vm_InsightBalancedCustomizationDetail
data.value: A few advanced tweaks are active, but the profile still reads like a deliberate daily-driver rather than an experiment bundle.

data.name: Vm_InsightConservativeCoreDetail
data.value: Advanced toggles are off, so this profile stays closer to the setup LibreSpot can reapply most predictably.

data.name: Vm_InsightCustomAppsDetailFormat
data.value: {0} will be installed through Spicetify custom_apps.

data.name: Vm_InsightExperimentalTerritoryDetail
data.value: Several advanced options are enabled. Expect a more distinctive shell, with a little more maintenance after Spotify updates.

data.name: Vm_InsightFreshBaselineDetail
data.value: Clean install is on, so LibreSpot will clear more leftovers before rebuilding the stack.

data.name: Vm_InsightLyricsStylingParkedDetail
data.value: The lyrics theme stays selected in your profile, but it will not apply until the lyrics patch is turned back on.

data.name: Vm_InsightMarketplaceFirstDetail
data.value: You are skipping the theme pack, so LibreSpot will lean on Marketplace and SpotX presentation tweaks instead of a bundled skin.

data.name: Vm_InsightMinimalSpicetifyDetail
data.value: Marketplace, theme pack, and built-in extensions are all pared back. This keeps the shell lean, but removes most of LibreSpot's customization layer.

data.name: Vm_InsightOverlayInstallDetail
data.value: LibreSpot will work on top of the current Spotify files. This is faster, but it leaves more room for older patch state to linger.

data.name: Vm_InsightRightSidebarOverlapDetail
data.value: Hide right sidebar and clear right sidebar styling both target the same surface. Hiding the sidebar wins, so simplify this pair if you want a cleaner config.

data.name: Vm_InsightSkippingCleanStartDetail
data.value: Because Spotify is not currently detected, overlay mode is unlikely to save time. A clean start is usually the calmer path.

data.name: Vm_InsightThemeRestoreReadyDetailFormat
data.value: {0} with {1} will be restored after the backend run completes.

data.name: Vm_ProfileActiveStatusFormat
data.value: {0} is active. The previous active profile pointer is kept for rollback.

data.name: Vm_ProfileComparisonSummaryFormat
data.value: {0} profile {1}. Theme: {2}/{3}; lyrics: {4}; extensions: {5}; custom apps: {6}; custom patches: {7}.

data.name: Vm_ProfileComparisonUnavailable
data.value: Comparison is unavailable until the profile can be loaded.

data.name: Vm_ProfileDeleteBody
data.value: LibreSpot will remove this local profile file. Bundled templates are kept, and deleting the active profile falls back to Recommended.

data.name: Vm_ProfileDeleteSummaryBody
data.value: Only the selected local profile JSON file is deleted. config.json and bundled templates are left intact.

data.name: Vm_ProfileDeletedStatusFormat
data.value: {0} was deleted. Active fallback is visible in the profile list.

data.name: Vm_ProfileImportBody
data.value: LibreSpot validated the profile file and will save it as a local profile only after you confirm. Importing does not start an install or acknowledge Spotify risk.

data.name: Vm_ProfileImportSharedBody
data.value: LibreSpot opened this share link as a preview only. Confirming saves it as a local profile; it does not start setup, reapply Spotify, or acknowledge Spotify risk.

data.name: Vm_ProfileImportedStatusFormat
data.value: {0} was imported. Preview or set it active when you are ready.

data.name: Vm_ProfileManyChoicesReadyFormat
data.value: {0} profile choices ready. Preview before applying if you want to inspect the settings first.

data.name: Vm_ProfileNoChoicesStatus
data.value: No profiles are available yet. Save the current Custom selections to create one.

data.name: Vm_ProfileOneChoiceReady
data.value: 1 profile choice ready. Preview before applying if you want to inspect the settings first.

data.name: Vm_ProfilePreviewedStatusFormat
data.value: {0} is previewed in Custom. No files were changed.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSavedStatusFormat
data.value: {0} was saved from the current Custom selections.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSetActiveBody
data.value: LibreSpot will write this profile to config.json and keep the previous active profile pointer for rollback. This does not start an install by itself.

data.name: Vm_ProfileShareQrTooLargeFormat
data.value: Share link is ready, but this profile is too large for a QR card: {0}

data.name: Vm_ProfileShareReady
data.value: QR card and share link are ready. Import still opens as a preview before saving.

data.name: Vm_ProfileSummaryFormat
data.value: {0} profile. Theme: {1} / {2}. Lyrics: {3}. Extensions: {4}. Premium flag: {5}. Custom patches: {6}.

data.name: Vm_RestartingSpotifyLog
data.value: Restarting Spotify so the completed changes load in a fresh client session.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleCategoryHealthDetail
data.value: Required redacted health report, runtime metadata, and catalog pin baseline.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleCategoryOperationDetail
data.value: Recent install and watcher state from the LibreSpot profile.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleCategoryLogsDetail
data.value: Selected install, watcher, and desktop rolling logs.

data.name: Vm_SupportBundleCategoryCrashesDetail
data.value: Newest crash report windows when present.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesDryRunPassedDetail
data.value: LibreSpot will stage a temporary patches.json when you apply this profile.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesFormattedStatus
data.value: The patches.json document was normalized with indentation for review.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesFormattedDetail
data.value: Dry run still checks regex patterns and match/replace pairs before Apply.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesFormatFailedDetail
data.value: Fix the JSON syntax, then run Format again.

data.name: Vm_CustomPatchesImportedDetailFormat
data.value: Review the JSON before applying this profile. Source SHA256 {0}.

data.name: Vm_RecommendedSetupActivityStatus
data.value: LibreSpot is rebuilding the tested SpotX and Spicetify stack with the default premium preset.

data.name: Vm_SetupPromptSummaryBody
data.value: LibreSpot will download, verify, and apply each step listed above. The window stays open so you can follow progress.

data.name: Vm_CustomSetupActivityStatus
data.value: LibreSpot is validating your selections before it patches Spotify and restores the chosen visual stack.

data.name: Vm_PlanSummaryDefault
data.value: LibreSpot will download, verify, and apply the selected setup.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceRemoveSelfDataBodySuffix
data.value: Only LibreSpot own data is removed. Spotify, SpotX patches, and Spicetify are not touched.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceDestructiveBodySuffix
data.value: This is a deeper reset path and may remove the current customization state. Continue only when you are ready to rebuild.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceStandardBodySuffix
data.value: LibreSpot will keep this window open and stream backend progress while the action runs.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryCheckUpdates
data.value: LibreSpot compares pinned versions plus the SpotX, Spicetify CLI, Marketplace, and themes compatibility matrix before you decide whether to update.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryClearCache
data.value: LibreSpot removes only its verified download cache and writes an operation receipt. Future installs rebuild cache entries after hash verification.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryReapply
data.value: Before refreshing SpotX and reapplying Spicetify, LibreSpot snapshots config-xpui.ini and CustomApps under LibreSpot_Backups. It restores missing files without overwriting refreshed packages. Marketplace browser storage is not included and may reset.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryRepairMarketplace
data.value: Before reinstalling Marketplace, LibreSpot snapshots config-xpui.ini and CustomApps under LibreSpot_Backups. It restores missing files without overwriting the refreshed Marketplace package. Marketplace browser storage is not included and may reset.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryOpenMarketplace
data.value: LibreSpot asks Spotify to open spotify:app:marketplace without reinstalling or changing your Spicetify files.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryRestoreVanilla
data.value: This removes the visible Spicetify layer while leaving SpotX in place, so Spotify returns to a calmer default look.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryUninstallSpicetify
data.value: LibreSpot restores Spotify first, then removes the Spicetify CLI, config folder, and PATH entry from this machine.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryFullReset
data.value: LibreSpot clears Spotify customization state and related leftovers so the next install can start from a truly clean baseline.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryRemoveSelfData
data.value: LibreSpot deletes its own configuration, profiles, backups, logs, crash reports, and the watcher task. Spotify, SpotX patches, and Spicetify are not touched.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryDefaultDestructive
data.value: LibreSpot will make a deeper cleanup pass and leave the result visible here afterward.

data.name: Vm_MaintenanceSummaryDefaultStandard
data.value: LibreSpot will keep the window open, stream progress here, and leave the result easy to review afterward.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyEnablePromptBody
data.value: LibreSpot will create a per-user scheduled task that runs after Windows sign-in and every 30 minutes. The watcher records the first Spotify version it sees, then reapplies your saved SpotX and Spicetify setup only after a version change while Spotify is closed.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyDisablePromptBody
data.value: LibreSpot will remove the scheduled task and keep your saved profile untouched. Manual Reapply will still restore the same saved setup from Maintenance.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyEnablePromptSummary
data.value: Creates LibreSpot\ReapplyWatcher, writes watcher.log in the LibreSpot profile folder, and saves AutoReapply_Enabled in config.json.

data.name: Vm_AutoReapplyDisablePromptSummary
data.value: Deletes LibreSpot\ReapplyWatcher if present and saves AutoReapply_Enabled=false in config.json.

data.name: Vm_ElevatedResumeActivityStatus
data.value: LibreSpot is resuming the setup you confirmed before relaunching as administrator.

data.name: Vm_AdminPromptBodyFormat
data.value: LibreSpot can open safely in standard mode, but setup and maintenance actions still need elevated access to modify Spotify, SpotX, and Spicetify files.{0}Relaunching as administrator keeps the same desktop shell and unlocks apply, reapply, and reset actions.

data.name: Vm_AdminPromptSummaryBody
data.value: Nothing changes until Windows approves the relaunch. You can stay here and keep reviewing settings if you are not ready.

data.name: Vm_RelaunchMissingPathStatus
data.value: LibreSpot could not resolve its current executable path.

data.name: Vm_RelaunchDeveloperStatus
data.value: LibreSpot is currently hosted by dotnet.exe in developer mode. Build a release binary and relaunch that as administrator.

data.name: Vm_RelaunchFailedStatus
data.value: The elevated process could not be started. Try right-clicking LibreSpot.exe and selecting Run as administrator manually.

data.name: Vm_RelaunchCanceledStatus
data.value: LibreSpot is still open in standard mode. You can keep reviewing settings and relaunch when you are ready.

data.name: Vm_RelaunchExceptionStatus
data.value: Windows did not start the elevated LibreSpot session. You can still close this window and run the app as administrator manually.

data.name: Vm_RiskPromptBodyFormat
data.value: LibreSpot modifies your Spotify installation to remove ads and apply themes. This violates Spotify Terms of Service and User Guidelines (https://spotify.com/legal/user-guidelines/). While enforcement against individual users has not been publicly documented, your account could be affected.{0}By continuing, you acknowledge this risk and agree to proceed at your own discretion.{0}You can restore stock Spotify at any time using Maintenance > Full Reset.

data.name: Vm_RiskPromptSummaryBody
data.value: LibreSpot will record your acknowledgment so this dialog does not appear again. No data leaves your machine.

data.name: Vm_CloseWhileRunningBody
data.value: LibreSpot aún está modificando Spotify.{0}Cerrar ahora detendrá la ejecución activa del backend, descartará la ventana de progreso en vivo y dejará los cambios parciales para una futura reaplicación si la necesita.

data.name: Vm_CloseWhileRunningSummaryBody
data.value: Mantenga LibreSpot abierto si desea que el paso actual del backend termine y el resultado final permanezca visible aquí.

data.name: Vm_LogConfigSaveCanceled
data.value: Se canceló el guardado de la configuración.

data.name: Vm_LogBackendCanceled
data.value: Se canceló la ejecución del backend.

data.name: Vm_LogResumingElevatedSetup
data.value: Reanudando la configuración confirmada después del reinicio como administrador.

data.name: Vm_LogConfigStageFailed
data.value: No se pudo preparar la configuración para el reinicio elevado: {0}

data.name: Vm_PromptSummaryDefaultBody
data.value: LibreSpot mantendrá la ventana abierta, mostrará el progreso aquí y dejará el resultado fácil de revisar después.
data.comment: PromptStateViewModel fallback summary for non-destructive prompts.

data.name: Vm_PromptSummaryDestructiveBody
data.value: LibreSpot realizará el cambio solicitado y dejará el resultado visible aquí para que pueda revisarlo después.
data.comment: PromptStateViewModel fallback summary for destructive prompts.

data.name: Vm_LogConfigSaveFailed
data.value: No se pudo guardar la configuración: {0}

data.name: Vm_LogOpenFolderFailed
data.value: No se pudo abrir la carpeta de LibreSpot: {0}

data.name: Vm_LogElevatedResumeFailed
data.value: No se pudo cargar la configuración preparada para reanudar después de la elevación: {0}

data.name: CrashWindowTitle
data.comment: Crash and recovery dialog window title.

data.name: CrashFatalTitle
data.value: LibreSpot hit an unexpected error and needs to close

data.name: CrashRecoverableBody
data.value: LibreSpot can keep running, but something failed in the background. Review the report if anything looks off before you continue.

data.name: CrashFatalBody
data.value: LibreSpot wrote a crash report so you can inspect what failed, reopen safely, and share the details if you need help.

data.name: CrashRecoverableSummaryBody
data.value: Copy the report path or open the crash folder now. If the app still behaves strangely, restart LibreSpot before you keep working.

data.name: CrashFatalSummaryBody
data.value: Copy the report path or open the crash folder now. When you reopen LibreSpot, the saved profile and logs will still be available for troubleshooting.

data.name: CrashFooter
data.value: LibreSpot keeps the crash report and rolling session logs on disk after this dialog closes.
